title: EARLY ENTREPRENEURS INITIATIVE - 211info
text: UPLIFT LEADERSHIP EARLY ENTREPRENEURS INITIATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a year-round education program that helps participants create and build their own businesses, products, services, or brands. Also provides a community calendar of events that focus on job readiness and career development. 525 3rd Street Suite 200 Lake Oswego, OR 97034 Eligibility: Ages 16-26 Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 266-1266 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 266-1266 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Community Calendars * Youth Issues Youth Employment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
